negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_090
prompt: The video opens with a close-up view of a large metal drum filled with roasted coffee beans, situated in a coffee roasting facility. The drum features a central mechanism with rotating arms designed to stir the beans evenly. A person, dressed in a blue long-sleeved shirt and a dark apron, is positioned next to the drum. They hold a white plastic container with both hands, preparing to collect some of the roasted beans into a plastic box. The container is initially empty, but as the video progresses, the person reaches into the drum with their right hand, scooping up a handful of the dark brown, evenly roasted beans and transferring them into the plastic container. The container begins to fill as the person continues to transfer the roasted coffee beans in. The drum rotates, ensuring the beans remain well-mixed and evenly roasted. By the final frame, the container is noticeably fuller, indicating that the person has collected a significant amount of the roasted coffee beans.
